results.evidence: Visible harness status reported rendered_nonblank after drawing 18 frames and running an internal canvas pixel check.
limitations: Full p5.js package is not installed locally.
The render used the harness' minimal p5-compatible canvas shim, not a full p5.js runtime.
No FPS or long-duration animation benchmark was run.

results.evidence: Visible harness status reported rendered_nonblank after WebGL compile, link, draw, and internal pixel check.
limitations: The shader was validated in a generic WebGL harness, not a product preview surface.
No FPS or extended animation benchmark was run.

results.evidence: Visible harness status reported module_export_available=true, local_three_runtime_available=false, and graceful_error='THREE is required.'
limitations: No local Three.js package is installed in this checkout.
The browser pass validated module loading and graceful dependency failure only.
No Three.js render or FPS benchmark is claimed.

claim_boundary: This is local browser QA evidence only. It is not a public deployment, not a product preview runtime claim, and not evidence of Hydra, DCC/MCP, autonomous immersive platform, or external execution.
